outcomeModel.outcomeA: Confirmation, value unchanged: audit-only classification change (PLACEHOLDER_UNCONFIRMED -> CANONICAL_CONFIRMED or EXPLICIT_PRODUCT_DEFAULT). No artifact JSON changes, no content hash change, no new artifact version, no parent cascade, no new combination version, no new release strictly required.
outcomeModel.outcomeB: Correction, value changes: leaf artifact content changes, requiring a new immutable artifact version and triggering the parent-reference cascade.
outcomeModel.note: This forecast does not assume every audit-classification change requires an artifact version -- both outcomes are reported per decision since values are not chosen in this task.

perDecisionForecast.expectedParentCascade: APPSEL_RACE_PLAN_V1 v3 (shared with D3 if resolved together) -> TEN_K__4D__INTERMEDIATE v5
INTERMEDIATE_MODIFIER v3 (and/or TEN_K_WORKOUT_PROGRESSION_V1 v3 -> TEN_K_MASTER v4) -> TEN_K__4D__INTERMEDIATE v5

perDecisionForecast.nextVersionIfContentChanges: EASY_STANDARD v3 (shared with D5 if resolved together)
FARTLEK v3 (shared with D7 if resolved together)

parentReferencesChanged: INTERMEDIATE_MODIFIER v2.eligibleWorkouts ONLY (confirmed absent from workoutCandidates)
perDecisionForecast.expectedParentCascade: INTERMEDIATE_MODIFIER v3 -> TEN_K__4D__INTERMEDIATE v5 (no TEN_K_WORKOUT_PROGRESSION_V1/TEN_K_MASTER cascade needed)

perDecisionForecast.nextVersionIfContentChanges: LONG_RUN_STANDARD v3 (shared with D9 if resolved together)
THRESHOLD_TEMPO v3 (shared with D11 if resolved together)

perDecisionForecast.auditOnlyOrContentChanging: either (or a third path: removal from active closure without a new GOAL_PACE_TEN_K version)
perDecisionForecast.expectedParentCascade: TEN_K_WORKOUT_PROGRESSION_V1 v3 -> TEN_K_MASTER v4 -> TEN_K__4D__INTERMEDIATE v5
perDecisionForecast.rootNewVersionNeeded: only under outcome B or removal path
perDecisionForecast.newPilotReleaseRequired: only under outcome B or removal path

efficiencyNote.description: Multiple Outcome-B decisions resolved in the same pass collapse onto a single new parent version rather than one per decision.
examples: D3 + D4 both consumed by APPSEL_RACE_PLAN_V1 -> one APPSEL_RACE_PLAN_V1 v3, not two
D5 + D6 (same EASY_STANDARD artifact) -> one EASY_STANDARD v3, not two; same for D7+D8, D9+D10, D11+D12
any subset of {D5,D7,D9,D11} and/or {D6,D8,D10,D12} changing together cascades to INTERMEDIATE_MODIFIER once (v3), not once per workout
regardless of how many of the 13 decisions resolve as Outcome B in one publish wave, TEN_K__4D__INTERMEDIATE needs at most one new version (v5)

worstCaseCascade.newProductionReleasesEnabled: only once all 13 decisions across the closure are non-PLACEHOLDER_UNCONFIRMED

touches: 4 workout artifacts -> INTERMEDIATE_MODIFIER (and possibly TEN_K_WORKOUT_PROGRESSION_V1/TEN_K_MASTER) -> v5 root
same 4 workout artifacts as B2 -> INTERMEDIATE_MODIFIER -> v5 root
PEAK_VOLUME_BANDS_V1 -> APPSEL_RACE_PLAN_V1 (shared with B5 if run together) -> v5 root

recommendation: Stage resolution work into research/decision batches per domain-blocker-resolution-plan.md's execution order, but publish as one combined wave once all desired resolutions for that wave are finalized -- mirroring Part 2's approach of bundling multiple technical migrations into one v4 candidate rather than one root version per fix.
recommendedPilotPublishPoint: Not before every decision intended for the next wave reaches a stable classification (CANONICAL_CONFIRMED, EXPLICIT_PRODUCT_DEFAULT, or a recorded removal); a whole batch should complete before cutting a new Pilot release, to avoid an unnecessary intermediate root version.
recommendedProductionPublishPoint: Only after all 13 decisions across all 7 batches are resolved -- the Production guard rejects the release based on blockingArtifactCount > 0 for the closure regardless of which specific decisions remain.
finalStatus: Version-cascade forecast complete for all 13 decisions and all 7 batches; no artifact was mutated.
